brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: Filter to just the hot minutes. Above one event per second.

expected.sql: SELECT minute, ROUND(n / 60.0, 2) AS rps FROM metrics WHERE service = 'chrono-portal-mirror' AND ROUND(n / 60.0, 2) > 1.0 ORDER BY minute

hints.text: Carol: 'Too many rows. The threshold should be above the quiet baseline — try 1.0.'
Carol: 'No rows. The threshold is too high — try 1.0.'
Carol: 'Query error. The threshold is a number — 1.0.'
Carol: 'rate(n, 1m) > 1.0 — anything above one event per second.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: Six rows. Eighteen minutes apart, give or take. That's not noise. That's a schedule.
